session.user:
Rename the class `ClaudePromptExecutor` to `ClaudeCliPromptExecutor` across the entire codebase. The class is defined in `src/erk/core/prompt_executor.py`.
Update ALL references including: - Class definition in src/erk/core/prompt_executor.py - Imports and usage in src/erk/core/context.py - Imports and usage in src/erk/core/fast_llm.py (note: there's only a TYPE_CHECKING import of PromptExecutor, but a reference to ClaudePromptExecutor via import in context.py) - References in tests/core/test_prompt_executor.py - References in tests/unit/core/test_context.py - Docstring examples in packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/prompt_executor.py (there are docstring references like `ClaudePromptExecutor()` in examples)
Do NOT rename the file itself - only the class name. Make sure to update all string references in docstrings/comments too.

1→"""Fast LLM calls via Anthropic SDK. 2→ 3→For lightweight operations (slug generation) where spawning a full 4→Claude CLI subprocess is too slow. Falls back to Claude CLI via 5→PromptExecutor when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is unavailable. 6→""" 7→ 8→from __future__ import annotations 9→ 10→import logging 11→import os 12→from typing import TYPE_CHECKING 13→ 14→from anthropic import Anthropic, APIError 15→from anthropic.types import TextBlock 16→ 17→from erk_shared.core.llm_caller import LlmCaller, LlmCallFailed, LlmResponse, NoApiKey 18→ 19→if TYPE_CHECKING: 20→ from erk_shared.core.prompt_executor import PromptExecutor 21→ 22→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) 23→ 24→ 25→class AnthropicLlmCaller(LlmCaller): 26→ def __init__(self, *, prompt_executor: PromptExecutor | None = None) -> None: 27→ self._prompt_executor = prompt_executor 28→ 29→ def call( 30→ self, prompt: str, *, system_prompt: str, max_tokens: int

if system_prompt is not None: full_prompt = f"<system>\n{system_prompt}\n</system>\n\n{prompt}" else: full_prompt = prompt
cmd.append(full_prompt) return cmd
class CodexPromptExecutor(PromptExecutor): """Production implementation using subprocess and Codex CLI."""
def __init__(self, console: Console | None) -> None: """Initialize CodexPromptExecutor with Console dependency.
Args: console: Console gateway for TTY detection. If None, creates an InteractiveConsole instance. """ self._console = console if console is not None else InteractiveConsole()
